title: Fix header overlapping hero image and update header tagline text

requirements.text: Update the header tagline bar (located at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/header[1]/div[2]/div[1]) to display the text 'Delicious Mexican food for every special occasion' instead of the current tagline text.

quotes: I want the header to say delicious Mexican food for every special occasion

acceptanceCriteria: The tagline bar in the header displays exactly 'Delicious Mexican food for every special occasion'
No other header content or layout is changed

requirements.text: Fix the fixed/sticky header in frontend/src/components/Header.tsx so it no longer overlaps the hero section image. The hero section and the girl image must be fully visible and not obscured by the header. Adjust the hero section top padding or offset to account for the header height so the image is completely visible from its top edge.

quotes: The header is covering the image that you created. I don't want the header covering the image of the girl

acceptanceCriteria: The girl/hero image is fully visible and not covered by the header at any point on page load
The header remains functional (navigation, mobile menu) and visually consistent
The hero section content starts below the header, with no clipping of the hero image at the top

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/
Do not modify files under frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Redesigning the header layout or navigation structure
Changing any other section's content or styling
